hero.description: Arcane Ledger is a GM-first campaign companion for tabletop RPGs. Build your world — locations, NPCs, factions, quests — and share exactly what your players need to see. Everything else stays behind the screen.
hero.disclaimer: Free to use · Multiplayer ready · EN / RU

features.title: Everything a GM needs
features.locations_maps_desc: Hierarchical world-building: regions, settlements, districts, buildings, dungeons. Upload maps and drop markers linked to locations and NPCs.
features.npcs_desc: Rich character sheets with portrait, appearance, backstory, personality, GM notes, and social relations.
features.party_characters_desc: Player character profiles with inline WYSIWYG editing — backstory, motivation, bonds, flaws.
features.factions_groups_desc: Track guilds, cults, families, councils. Manage membership, goals, and relationship to the party.
features.session_journal_desc: Log every session with a short recap and full notes. Each player keeps their own personal notes too. An auto-formatted timeline of your campaign.
features.social_relations_desc: Directional relationship graph between any entities — characters, NPCs, groups. Interactive force graph and chord diagram. Friendliness scale with notes.
features.species_races_desc: Homebrew species catalogue with traits, size, and lore. Linked to characters and NPCs automatically.
features.quests_desc: Active and completed quest tracking with objectives, status, and related sessions.
features.dice_roller_desc: d4 through d100 — roll any combination, see full history. Always available from the sidebar.
features.gm_notes_desc: Private notes on every entity — locations, NPCs, characters, groups. Completely hidden from players via the visibility system. Your secrets stay secret.
features.multiplayer_desc: Invite players to your campaign. Control exactly what they see — from whole entities down to individual fields. Real-time updates via WebSocket.
features.visibility_desc: Fine-grained player visibility. Toggle fields, connections, and entire entities. Presets for quick setup — All, Basic, or None.

roadmap.title: On the horizon
roadmap.description: These features are planned or in progress. The app is actively developed — and these are next up.
roadmap.items_artifacts_desc: Magical items, homebrew equipment, cursed relics — with properties and history.
roadmap.campaign_timeline_desc: Visual chronological map of sessions, events, and quest milestones.
roadmap.export_pdf_desc: Print-ready character sheets, session summaries, and location compendium.
roadmap.gm_screen_desc: Dedicated GM screen with encounter tools, reference tables, and session prep.
roadmap.ai_npc_gen_desc: Describe the vibe, get a full NPC — name, appearance, backstory, personality. Powered by AI, flavored by your campaign's context.
roadmap.ai_session_parser_desc: Paste your messy session notes, get structured entries — NPCs mentioned, locations visited, quests advanced. Automatically.
roadmap.oauth_login_desc: Sign in with Google or Discord. One click, no passwords.
roadmap.social_gm_groups_desc: A shared space for GM groups running parallel campaigns. Coordinate schedules, share notes, see each other's worlds.

contact.title: Say hello
contact.description: Questions, feedback, collaboration — reach out on any of these.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.description: Use the test credentials to explore — or sign in and start building your world.
